2279810.name: super fight
2279810.description:
super fight is a Q cute cartoon style, which mainly focuses on competitive battle. Players can play 2V2 and 5V5 battles against each other, which is a Q cute version of competitive game.

Character setting: There are 22 characters in the game, and we release new characters from time to time. Each character has multiple active skills, and in match mode, the player can fight with the purchased game character. Game character positioning can be divided into sorcerer, warlock, Qi Qi, etc.; Different heroes have different stats and skills.

Items: The in-game equipment is divided into physical attack, spell attack, defense equipment, mobile equipment and field equipment. Players can buy advanced equipment according to the accumulated gold amount. Each player can buy a variety of equipment in the regular mode of battle.

Game mode: In sper fight 2V2,5V5 battles, a reasonable lineup can make the battle easier. There are multiple types of player division in the game. In group battles, each character is responsible for his own identity task, and reasonable placement of each character in each different position can make the development effect better. The division of labor between the upper and lower bounds is important. In position allocation, the top, middle and bottom three players are responsible for each pawn line and the enemies on the line, and can travel other routes to help their teammates in advantage games.
2279810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
